stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Caballero. Riley Greene scores. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Ali Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Teel reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Blaze Alexander. Jacob Gonzalez scores. Sam Antonacci scores.
